code: export const projectsData=[{id:1,title:"GreenLeaf Nursery Portal",industry:"Agriculture / E-commerce",description:"Local nurseries often struggle with manual inventory tracking and limited customer reach beyond their physical location. Kognivex built a comprehensive digital storefront that allows enthusiasts to browse thousands of plant varieties with ease. We integrated a real-time inventory management system and a robust plant-care knowledge base. The solution includes a seasonal subscription model for regular maintenance and fertilizer delivery. Since launch, the business has seen a massive expansion in its customer base across the region.",features:["Dynamic Plant Catalog","Automated Inventory Sync","Secure Multi-Payment Gateway","Interactive Plant Care Guides","Regional Delivery Tracking"],image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1466781783364-391eaf19df4c?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",slug:"greenleaf-nursery"},{id:2,title:"SwiftPath Travels",industry:"Travel & Logistics",description:"The travel industry faces significant challenges with overbooking and inefficient manual seat allocations. We developed a high-performance bus booking engine that handles thousands of concurrent users during peak hours. The platform features an interactive seat selection tool and live GPS tracking for all active routes. Kognivex implemented an automated SMS/Email notification system for delays and cancellations. This digital transformation reduced administrative errors by 95% and significantly improved passenger trust.",features:["Real-time Seat Selection","Live GPS Route Tracking","Dynamic Pricing Engine","Integrated Refund Portal","Automated Passenger Alerts"],image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544620347-c4fd4a3d5957?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",slug:"swiftpath-travels"},{id:3,title:"NexusSoft Solutions Corporate",industry:"Software & Technology",description:"Modern tech companies need a digital presence that reflects their technical prowess. Kognivex designed a futuristic, high-performance corporate website focused on lead generation and B2B conversion. We implemented interactive case studies and a client-only portal for project tracking. The architecture uses modern headless CMS for lightning-fast content updates. The project resulted in a 65% increase in high-value enterprise inquiries and a significantly lower bounce rate due to superior UX design.",features:["Headless CMS Integration","Interactive Project Showcases","Secure B2B Client Portal","SEO Optimized Architecture","Automated Lead Scoring"],image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497215728101-856f4ea42174?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",slug:"nexussoft-solutions"},{id:4,title:"EduStream Academy LMS",industry:"Education / EdTech",description:"Scaling a physical school to a hybrid learning environment requires a robust technological foundation. We built an end-to-end Learning Management System (LMS) that supports live video classes, digital assignments, and automated grading. The platform includes a specialized dashboard for parents to monitor student progress in real-time. Kognivex focused on accessibility and low-bandwidth performance to ensure education reaches every student. This solution has empowered the academy to triple its student enrollment globally.",features:["Live Virtual Classrooms","Automated Grading System","Parent-Teacher Dashboard","Secure Digital Assessments","Multi-device Course Access"],image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050335392-9beffa5d2293?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",slug:"edustream-academy"},{id:5,title:"Aura Creative Studio",industry:"Media & Photography",description:"Professional photographers often lose hours in manual image delivery and client feedback cycles. Kognivex developed a premium gallery management platform that streamlines the entire post-production workflow. Clients can view high-resolution proofs, select favorites, and request edits directly through the secure interface. We integrated a digital contract and automated invoice system to simplify business operations. The studio now delivers projects 70% faster, allowing them to focus on their creative work.",features:["High-Res Gallery Management","Interactive Client Proofing","Automated Digital Contracts","Seamless Download Manager","Online Booking Calendar"],image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542038784456-1ea8e935640e?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",slug:"aura-creative-studio"},{id:6,title:"LuxeCart Fashion Hub",industry:"E-commerce / Retail",description:"High cart abandonment is the primary challenge for growing fashion brands. Kognivex engineered a Progressive Web App (PWA) storefront optimized for mobile speed and instant checkout. We implemented an AI-driven recommendation engine that suggests products based on user browsing behavior. The platform features an integrated loyalty program and multi-currency support for international sales. The brand experienced a 30% reduction in cart abandonment and a significant boost in mobile conversion rates.",features:["PWA High-Speed Storefront","AI Product Recommendations","One-Click Secure Checkout","Loyalty & Rewards Program","Global Currency Support"],image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1441986300917-64674bd600d8?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",slug:"luxecart-fashion"},{id:7,title:"VitalCare Medical Hub",industry:"Healthcare / Clinic",description:"Inefficient patient scheduling and paper-based records often lead to long wait times in clinics. Kognivex delivered a HIPAA-compliant healthcare management platform that digitizes patient journey from appointment to prescription. The system features a secure telemedicine portal for remote consultations and an automated appointment reminder system via WhatsApp. We integrated an Electronic Medical Record (EMR) system for seamless doctor access. This digital transformation reduced patient wait times by 40%.",features:["Online Appointment Scheduling","HIPAA-Compliant EMR","Integrated Telemedicine","Automated Health Alerts","Digital Prescription Portal"],image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519494026892-80bbd2d6fd0d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",slug:"vitalcare-medical"},{id:8,title:"BistroCrave Digital Dining",industry:"Hospitality / Restaurant",description:"Rising commission fees from third-party delivery apps are eating into restaurant profits. Kognivex built a direct-to-consumer online ordering and table reservation system. The platform includes a contactless QR-code menu for in-house dining and a real-time kitchen display sync for order management. We integrated a localized loyalty system to encourage repeat business. The restaurant now saves thousands in monthly commissions and has built a direct digital relationship with its customers.",features:["Direct Online Ordering","QR-Code Contactless Menu","Real-time Kitchen Sync","Table Reservation System","Localized Loyalty Program"],image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",slug:"bistrocrave-digital"}];

sourcesContent:
export const projectsData = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "GreenLeaf Nursery Portal",
    industry: "Agriculture / E-commerce",
    description: "Local nurseries often struggle with manual inventory tracking and limited customer reach beyond their physical location. Kognivex built a comprehensive digital storefront that allows enthusiasts to browse thousands of plant varieties with ease. We integrated a real-time inventory management system and a robust plant-care knowledge base. The solution includes a seasonal subscription model for regular maintenance and fertilizer delivery. Since launch, the business has seen a massive expansion in its customer base across the region.",

    slug: "greenleaf-nursery"
  },
  {

    title: "SwiftPath Travels",
    industry: "Travel & Logistics",
    description: "The travel industry faces significant challenges with overbooking and inefficient manual seat allocations. We developed a high-performance bus booking engine that handles thousands of concurrent users during peak hours. The platform features an interactive seat selection tool and live GPS tracking for all active routes. Kognivex implemented an automated SMS/Email notification system for delays and cancellations. This digital transformation reduced administrative errors by 95% and significantly improved passenger trust.",

  {

    industry: "Software & Technology",
    description: "Modern tech companies need a digital presence that reflects their technical prowess. Kognivex designed a futuristic, high-performance corporate website focused on lead generation and B2B conversion. We implemented interactive case studies and a client-only portal for project tracking. The architecture uses modern headless CMS for lightning-fast content updates. The project resulted in a 65% increase in high-value enterprise inquiries and a significantly lower bounce rate due to superior UX design.",
    features: [

      "Interactive Project Showcases",

    slug: "nexussoft-solutions"

We built an end-to-end Learning Management System (LMS) that supports live video classes, digital assignments, and automated grading. The platform includes a specialized dashboard for parents to monitor student progress in real-time. Kognivex focused on accessibility and low-bandwidth performance to ensure education reaches every student. This solution has empowered the academy to triple its student enrollment globally.",
    features: [

      "Parent-Teacher Dashboard",

    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050335392-9beffa5d2293?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",
    slug: "edustream-academy"
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    title: "Aura Creative Studio",
    industry: "Media & Photography",
    description: "Professional photographers often lose hours in manual image delivery and client feedback cycles. Kognivex developed a premium gallery management platform that streamlines the entire post-production workflow. Clients can view high-resolution proofs, select favorites, and request edits directly through the secure interface. We integrated a digital contract and automated invoice system to simplify business operations. The studio now delivers projects 70% faster, allowing them to focus on their creative work.",
    features: [
      "High-Res Gallery Management",
      "Interactive Client Proofing",
      "Automated Digital Contracts",
      "Seamless Download Manager",
      "Online Booking Calendar"
    ],
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542038784456-1ea8e935640e?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",
    slug: "aura-creative-studio"
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    title: "LuxeCart Fashion Hub",
    industry: "E-commerce / Retail",
    description: "High cart abandonment is the primary challenge for growing fashion brands. Kognivex engineered a Progressive Web App (PWA) storefront optimized for mobile speed and instant checkout. We implemented an AI-driven recommendation engine that suggests products based on user browsing behavior. The platform features an integrated loyalty program and multi-currency support for international sales. The brand experienced a 30% reduction in cart abandonment and a significant boost in mobile conversion rates.",
    features: [
      "PWA High-Speed Storefront",
      "AI Product Recommendations",
      "One-Click Secure Checkout",
      "Loyalty & Rewards Program",
      "Global Currency Support"
    ],
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1441986300917-64674bd600d8?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",
    slug: "luxecart-fashion"
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    title: "VitalCare Medical Hub",
    industry: "Healthcare / Clinic",
    description: "Inefficient patient scheduling and paper-based records often lead to long wait times in clinics. Kognivex delivered a HIPAA-compliant healthcare management platform that digitizes patient journey from appointment to prescription. The system features a secure telemedicine portal for remote consultations and an automated appointment reminder system via WhatsApp. We integrated an Electronic Medical Record (EMR) system for seamless doctor access. This digital transformation reduced patient wait times by 40%.",
    features: [
      "Online Appointment Scheduling",
      "HIPAA-Compliant EMR",
      "Integrated Telemedicine",
      "Automated Health Alerts",
      "Digital Prescription Portal"
    ],
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519494026892-80bbd2d6fd0d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800",
    slug: "vitalcare-medical"
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    title: "BistroCrave Digital Dining",
    industry: "Hospitality / Restaurant",
    description: "Rising commission fees from third-party delivery apps are eating into restaurant profits. Kognivex built a direct-to-consumer online ordering and table reservation system. The platform includes a contactless QR-code menu for in-house dining and a real-time kitchen display sync for order management. We integrated a localized loyalty system to encourage repeat business. The restaurant now saves thousands in monthly commissions and has built a direct digital relationship with its customers.",
    features: [
      "Direct Online Ordering",
      "QR-Code Contactless Menu",
      "Real-time Kitchen Sync",
      "Table Reservation System",
      "Localized Loyalty Program"

    slug: "bistrocrave-digital"
